title: Hanseong CFO to Speak at Brussels AI Policy Forum
body: Ji-Yeon Kwon, chief financial officer of South Korea's Hanseong Group, has been added to the speaker list for the European AI Policy Forum scheduled for March 20 in Brussels, organizers confirmed Monday. Kwon is expected to speak about cross-border technology investment and the regulatory environment for AI companies operating between jurisdictions. Her appearance follows Hanseong's recently announced licensing deal with Vantara AI and is seen in policy circles as an attempt by the company to demonstrate engagement with European regulators. The forum, organized by the Centre for European Technology Policy, typically draws officials from the European Commission, national data protection authorities, and industry representatives. Last year's event featured a keynote from an FTC official on transatlantic AI governance, a theme expected to recur this year. Hanseong said Kwon would represent the company's perspective as an international investor, not as a party to any regulatory proceeding.
